zh.lifeSummary: 當Guillaume dit le Libérateur de Provence comte d'Arles於0950年出生在法國普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾時，他的父親Boson II comte d'Arles et d'Avignon30歲，母親Constance de Provence31歲。他於0976年與Arsinde de Comminges結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於0993年8月29日在法國普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾瓦歐可盧斯阿維尼享年43歲，埋葬在法國瓦歐可盧斯薩利安斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guillaume dit le Libérateur de Provence comte d'Arles于0950年出生在法国普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾时，他的父亲Boson II comte d'Arles et d'Avignon30岁，母亲Constance de Provence31岁。他于0976年与Arsinde de Comminges结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于0993年8月29日在法国普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾瓦歐可盧斯阿維尼享年43岁，埋葬在法国瓦歐可盧斯薩利安斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Provence
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Province   1, a cognate of 3 below. This surname is very rare in Britain.
Probably also an altered form of   Provance   1 and hence a variant of   Purviance  , a surname of (ultimately) Scottish origin. Compare   Provance   1.
In some cases possibly also French: habitational name from Provence, a region in southern France (see   Provencal  ). Compare   Province   3 and also 1 above.

variants.name: Province
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Provence, a region in southern France (see   Provencal  ). Compare   Provence   1 and   Provins   1.
Altered form of   Provance   1 and hence a variant of   Purviance  , a surname of (ultimately) Scottish origin. Compare   Provins   2.

nameMeanings.name: Guillaume
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: dit
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Dorothy
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

nameMeanings.name: le
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Guillaume dit le Libérateur de Provence comte d'Arles was born in 0950, in Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France, his father, Boson II comte d'Arles et d'Avignon, was 30 and his mother, Constance de Provence, was 31. He married Arsinde de Comminges in 0976. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died on 29 August 0993, in Avignon, Vaucluse, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France, at the age of 43, and was buried in Sarrians, Vaucluse, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guillaume dit le Libérateur de Provence comte d'Arles est né en 0950, à Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France, son père, Boson II comte d'Arles et d'Avignon, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Constance de Provence, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Arsinde de Comminges en 0976. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé le 29 août 0993, à Avignon, Vaucluse, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterré à Sarrians, Vaucluse, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guillaume dit le Libérateur de Provence comte d'Arles 0950 in Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Boson II comte d'Arles et d'Avignon 30 und seine Mutter Constance de Provence 31. Er hat 0976 Arsinde de Comminges geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb am 29. August 0993 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Avignon, Vaucluse, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Frankreich und wurde in Sarrians, Vaucluse, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume dit le Libérateur de Provence comte d'Arles è nato il nel 0950 nel Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia, il suo padre, Boson II comte d'Arles et d'Avignon, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Constance de Provence, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Arsinde de Comminges nel 0976. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 29 agosto 0993, nel Avignon, Vaucluse, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia, all'età di 43 anni, e fu sepolto a Sarrians, Vaucluse, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Guillaume dit le Libérateur de Provence comte d'Arlesが0950年にフランスプローベンセ-アルペス-クoト ド'アズルで生まれた時，父Boson II comte d'Arles et d'Avignonは30歳，母Constance de Provenceは31歳であった。0976年にArsinde de Commingesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は0993年8月29日にフランスプローベンセ-アルペス-クoト ド'アズルヴァウクルゼアヴィグノンで43歳で死去し，フランスヴァウクルゼサリアンスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Guillaume dit le Libérateur de Provence comte d'Arles(이)가 0950년 프랑스 프로븐스-알페스-co트 드'아저에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Boson II comte d'Arles et d'Avignon(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Constance de Provence(은)는 31세였다. 그는 0976년 Arsinde de Comminges(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 0993년 8월 29일 프랑스 프로븐스-알페스-co트 드'아저 바c루스 아비뇰에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 바c루스 사리아스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume dit le Libérateur de Provence comte d'Arles nasceu em 0950, em Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, França, seu pai, Boson II comte d'Arles et d'Avignon, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Constance de Provence, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Arsinde de Comminges em 0976. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 29 de agosto de 0993, em Avignon, Vaucluse, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, França, com 43 anos, e foi sepultado em Sarrians, Vaucluse, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guillaume dit le Libérateur de Provence comte d'Arles родился в 0950 г. в местности провенсе-алпес-кoт д'азур, Франция, его отцу по имени Boson II comte d'Arles et d'Avignon было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Constance de Provence, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Arsinde de Comminges в 0976 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер 29 августа 0993 г. в местности авигнон, вауклус, провенсе-алпес-кoт д'азур, Франция в возрасте 43 лет и был похоронен в местности саррянс, вауклус, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guillaume dit le Libérateur de Provence comte d'Arles nació en 0950, en Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia, su papá, Boson II comte d'Arles et d'Avignon, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Constance de Provence, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Arsinde de Comminges en 0976. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 29 de agosto de 0993, en Avignon, Vaucluse, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia, a la edad de 43 años, y fue sepultado en Sarrians, Vaucluse, Francia.
